titleStmt.title: SII 9.319: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 319. (A.R. No. 90 of 1904.) ON THE SIXTH SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1116, Pramāthi, Kārtika, śu. paurṇami, Sōmavāra, Sōmagrahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1193, November 10, Wednesday on which day there was a lunar eclipse; the week-day given in the record is an error. It refers itself to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Ballāḷa (II). The king is said to have made a gift of a large tract of land when he was in the ṇelevīḍu of Bāḷguḷi, for the service of the god Svayaṁbhu-Kalidēva of the place, after washing the feet of the five hundred Mahājanas. The king's genealogy is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁ
bhavē .
svasti śrīrvijayaśśubhaṁ . śaṁbhuśśaṁ vō vitaratuta rāṁ sarvvalōkaikanāthō gaurīThis letter is written above the
pīnastanadriḍhaparīraṁbhasaṁjātaharṣaḥ . cūḍābhūṣāyitasurasa
ri(r)nnīrajātaṁ nitāṁtannityōnmēṣaṁ kuvaḷeyamabhūdyasya mauḷīndupādaiḥ .
viṣṇōrnābhisarōruhaṁ vijayatē lōkaikarakṣāmaṇēryyasmādviśvasi
srikṣāyātrimasṛjajjātaṟprajānāṁ patiḥ tasyātrērvvimaḷākṣiśukti
janitaḥ pīyūṣarōcirmmaṇiḥ śauryyaudāryyakaḷāvatāmudabhavattasmā
dyadūnāṁ kulaṁ . jātōtra prabhuratnarōhaṇagirau kō vā na lōkōttaraḥ . kinnā
bhūdiha haihayō nṛpavaraḥ paulastyadarpāpahaḥ saṁjātō nu niraṁjanōpi
jagatāṁ rakṣāmaṇiḥ śrīpatirbhbhūbhārāyitavairivīradahanaprauḍhapratā
pānaḷaḥ . tadvaṁśasambhavaḥ kaścitkarṇnāṭyā gauḍayōginā hoysaḷētyu
ditō byāghramahanvēṇuśalākayā . tadadbhutamivālakṣya ho
ysaḷaṁ taṁ janā jaguḥ . dhīrōdāttākarō lōkē tadādi vitataṁ kulaṁ . jātastatra pa
yōnidhau bahuguṇōnarghyassamagradyutiścūḍāḷaṁkaraṇīkritō nripavarai
rddhīrōhyanēkō maṇiḥ dēvānāmavanēśca bhāgyavibhavaiḥ . puṇyādriṇō bhāvi
tō hridyōbhūdiha viṣṇuvardhdhana yiti khyātō maṇiḥ kaustubhaḥ . tasyārivīravipinaprabhaThis letter
vapratāpadāvassapatnavanitōśvasitaiḥ prabhūtaḥ . tāpaṁ digaṁtagatavairimanassu
cakrē karppūrasāravimaḷaṁ ca yaśōnutāpaṁ . vairivīrakulastaṁbhaṁ bhindanviṣamavikramaḥ .
nārasiṁhastatō jajñē hiraṇyakaśipupradaḥ . tasminrājjyōdayaṁ samēyuṣi bhai
śaṁ praspardhipadmākarassaṁkōcaṁ pratipadyatē kuvaḷayaṁ cōjjaiṁbhatē saṁtataṁ jyōtsnāni
rmmaḷakīrttipūritajagatikṣīrābdhivadvardhdhatē santāpaṁ cujahuḥkarairmmadhutaraiḥprī
tiṁ ca nītāḥ prajāḥ . tadvaṁśārnnavamāṇikyaṁ sarvvajñasurapādapaḥ . tatō ballāḷabhūpōbhūllā
ḷabhūpāḷaśātanaḥ . yatkrōdhānaḷajihvayā sa vijayo kāmaḥ kaitō bhasmasāt lōkōtsāda
karaḥ karīśvarapatiḥ prōdbhēditō bhillamaḥ [.] yēnānēkaguṇōnnatatripathagā kīrtirdhritā śāśvatī sōyaṁ
vīraviḷāsakēḷivija�yo ballāḷaprithvīśvaraḥ . vīrāṇāṁ pravaraḥ kaitī śrutadharaḥ saujanyaratnāka
rastarkkavyākaraṇāgamēṣu bharatē vātsyāyanīyē prabhuḥ . dānē kalpatarurmmatau suruguru
rvairīndrabhūbhaitsvaruśśrīballāḷamahīpatirvijayatāmācandratāraṁ sukhaṁ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ yādavakuḷāṁbaradyumaṇi samyaktacūḍāmaṇi malerājarāja male
paroḷgaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa śanivārasiddhi giridurggamalla caladaṁkarāma niśśaṁkapratāpacakrava
rtti śrīvīraballāḷadēvaru śrīmatu hariścaṁdradattiyagrahāra bāḷguḷiya nelevīḍino
ḷu sakaḷadiśāvarananēkādhiṣṭitaṁ māḍi sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttami
rddu śakanripavarṣada 1116 neya pramāthisaṁvatsarada kārtikada paurṇnami sōma
vāra sōmagrahaṇa saṁkrāṁti vyatīpātaṁ kūḍida puṇyadinadoḷā Ūraśrī
svayaṁbhukalidēvara Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgakhaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnnōddhārakkaṁ Alliya brāhma
ṇaragrāsanakkameṁdu naṁdiyabēhūra samacaturāghāṭa sīmeyiṁdaḷa
gaṇa samasta bhūmiyanitumaṁ sarvvābādhāparihāra sarvvanamaśyavāgi svasti
yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānapārāyaṇajapa
samādhiśīlaguṇasampaṁnarappa śrīmadu hariścaṁdradattiyagrahā
raṁ bāḷguḷiyaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷayvadiṁbara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi
biṭṭa . pakṣadoḷī dharmmavanabhirakṣisidaṁgatuḷapuṇyamidanaḷidātaṁgakṣayanarakaṁ
nijavaṁśakṣayavāṁtaṁ dharitriyoḷolaviṁdāḷvaṁ . na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhuḥ
dēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamēkākinaṁ hanti dēvasvaṁ putrapautra
kaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.319 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
